channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandoned Lime Bike blocking pavement, 20th March
item.description:
Lime Bike left on savoy place pavement near Adelphi carpark.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Savoy Place, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poster tied to road sign, 20th March
item.description:
Location: Lulworth Road near junction with Bellegrove Road The is a poster that is secure to a mini pallet that is tied to the Lulworth Road sign post using a black plastic tie. It is fully of the public realm.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellegrove Road, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Is this tree pit supposed to be planted or not?, 20th March
item.description:
Please could this be inspected? If ok to plant and come back into use it will need to be dug out by Highways and made ready for planting. Currently it is just being parked over....

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmstead Avenue, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bushes and trees overgrown, 20th March
item.description:
Bushes and trees overgrown.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dunkery Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Same car reported 6 times still parking illegally, 20th March
item.description:
Same resident at Pynfolds- still parking at a spot that does not exist, still making manoeuvres out of legal spaces difficult, still getting away with it by moving car before 8:30am.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jamaica Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Temporary traffic lights, 19th March
item.description:
The temporary traffic lights cannot be seen from the stop line causing cars to remain at the lights on green and constant road rage. Please either relocate the lights, introduce secondary lights, or relocate the stop line.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Church Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large rubbish abandoned on the pavement., 19th March
item.description:
Large rubbish abandoned on the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Keverne Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light out in alleyway, 19th March
item.description:
Very dangerous for women travelling alone at night, streetlight out in the alleyway at the top
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bridge Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A broken railing across from enfield town station, 19th March
item.description:
Broken railing

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southbury Road, Enfield

item.title: Large pothole After roundabout, 19th March
item.description:
Very large pothole on bus route and only getting bigger
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alers Road, Blendon, Greater London

item.title: 33 Kenilworth Road, 19th March

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London

item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Fly tipping by bexleyheath station, 19th March
item.description:
What can only be assumed as several bed frames and mattresses have been dumped alongside other rubbish in the alleyway beside bexleyheath station!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Avenue Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light - out, 19th March
item.description:
Street light p39 15 Light out Appears this was reported THREE months ago!!!!
